goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 15:30'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should depart from 'norwich'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum and should be in the centre
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 15:30
The train should leave on tuesday and should depart from norwich
Make sure you get departure time and train ID
